purpose: Machine-readable governance ledger for V2 live-job tranche accounting. This file does not authorize live jobs by itself.

approvalPointer.source: Captain message in current Codex thread: "New job budget: 18"
approvalPointer.summary: Captain reset/extended the V2 HighJump live-job budget to 18 after HJ23 exposed source-material and W5 generalization gaps.

latestReset.reason: Captain provided a new 18-job budget to continue HighJump validation and repair toward complete V2 reports.

currentTrancheAccounting.note: Captain reset the HighJump continuation budget to 18. Seven jobs have been consumed in the post-reset HJ24 report-gauntlet sequence: two Bolsonaro source-material repairs, two Bolsonaro W5 no-evidence checks, one asylum full-report pass, one hydrogen report-writer boundary-reference stop, and one hydrogen report-writer boundary-id repair pass. Remaining budget is 11.

unreconciledHistoricalNote.summary: The supplied 2026-05-21 HighJump handover claimed a separate 20-slot budget that was not reflected in this ledger. The 2026-05-22 Captain reset to 18 supersedes prior remaining balance for future accounting only; it does not validate or reclassify any unledgered historical job.

consumption.note: Operational miss: submitted through V1 claimboundary path during runtime refresh confusion; not V2 evidence.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ11_Source_Material_Coverage_Repair.md and Captain/Steer-Co HighJump continuation authority
consumption.note: Operational miss: runtime was refreshed, but submitted variant was claimboundary, so hidden V2 artifacts were absent.

consumption.approvalPointer: Steer-Co quick consent in current Codex thread after two wrong-variant HJ11 submissions
consumption.note: Correct V2 canary proved nine-record W3/W4/W5 fan-in but stopped at W5 schema_validation_failed on integrityEvents.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ12_W5_Integrity_Event_Prompt_Contract_Repair.md plus Steer-Co quick consent in current Codex thread
consumption.note: W5 accepted six EvidenceItems and W8-G created a draft; draft remains UNVERIFIED due lack of direct comparative efficiency evidence.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ13_OpenAlex_Source_Material_Balance_Repair.md plus Steer-Co consent in current Codex thread under Captain no-artificial-block directive
consumption.note: Hidden V2 chain reached W8-G and created an 8966-byte internal Alpha draft, but Source Material still contained only one OpenAlex record plus eight Wikimedia records, so the HJ13 balance criterion was not met.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ14_Wikimedia_Source_Material_Depth_Repair.md plus Steer-Co consent in current Codex thread under Captain no-artificial-block directive
consumption.note: Hidden V2 chain reached W8-G and created a 7908-byte internal Alpha draft with five cited EvidenceItem refs, but W4-A Source Material byte distribution was unchanged from HJ13, so the HJ14 source-depth criterion was not met.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ15_OpenAlex_Source_Material_Fan_In_Repair.md plus Steer-Co consent in current Codex thread under Captain no-artificial-block directive
consumption.note: OpenAlex Source Material fan-in improved to three OpenAlex records plus six Wikimedia records, but the resulting 12736-byte bounded material set exceeded the existing 12288-byte W4-G aggregate cap, so W4-H/W5/W8 did not proceed.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ16_W4G_W4H_Aggregate_Cap_Recalibration.md plus Steer-Co consent in current Codex thread under Captain no-artificial-block directive
consumption.note: HJ16 closed the prior W4-G aggregate cap stop: W4-A admitted nine records and W4-H created one 11111-byte aggregate packet under the new 16384-byte cap. W5 executed and stopped at damaged_execution / parse_failure with json_parse_error, so W8-B/W8-G were not created.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ17_W5_Output_Budget_Repair.md plus Steer-Co consent in current Codex thread under Captain no-artificial-block directive
consumption.note: HJ17 closed the W5 parse/truncation stop: W5 accepted three EvidenceItems with 1588 output tokens under the new 8000-token ceiling, W8-B created an internal Alpha result candidate, and W8-G created a 5413-byte internal Alpha draft. Public V2 remained blocked/precutover/damaged and default admin projections stayed redacted.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ18_Internal_Report_Writer.md plus Captain-authorized 8-job HighJump continuation budget
consumption.note: HJ18 proved hidden/internal aggregation_narrative report-writer reachability and containment, but the provider output hit the 4000 output-token ceiling and failed JSON parse. No report markdown was produced; public V2 remained blocked/precutover/damaged and default admin projection stayed hash/length/provenance-only.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ19_Report_Writer_Output_Budget_Repair.md plus Captain-authorized 8-job HighJump continuation budget
consumption.note: HJ19 runtime refreshed to source including implementation commit 2cdc9ce5 plus docs projection commit 4e2ed098. The run used explicit claimboundary-v2 and reached CU, Query Planning, W2, and W5, but did not reach W8-B/HJ19 because W5 stopped as damaged_execution / schema_validation_failed with evidenceItems too_big. Public V2 remained blocked/precutover/damaged; default hidden routes remained no-store/redacted.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ20_W5_EvidenceItem_Output_Shaping_Repair.md plus Captain-authorized HighJump continuation budget
consumption.note: The job used explicit claimboundary-v2 and completed with the expected public precutover/damaged envelope, but hidden artifact probes returned app-level HTML 404 responses and the local services then stopped before process-local hidden artifacts could be captured. This consumes one live job but is not analytical pass/fail evidence for HJ20. Exactly one HJ20 evaluability rerun is allowed only after handler-level JSON hidden-route preflight and stable runtime provenance.

consumption.approvalPointer: Steer-Co plus Claude Opus consent after unevaluable HJ20 capture miss; Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ20_W5_EvidenceItem_Output_Shaping_Repair.md
consumption.note: Rerun used explicit claimboundary-v2 after clean status, runtime refresh, API/Web hash match, and handler-level JSON hidden-route preflight. W5 completed accepted with 4 EvidenceItems, W8-B created an internal Alpha report result candidate, W8-G created a 7843-byte internal Alpha draft, and the internal report writer created an 8759-byte hidden draft. Public V2 remained 4.0.0-cb-precutover / blocked_precutover / report_damaged with reportMarkdown length 0; default admin projections stayed hash/length/provenance-only.

consumption.approvalPointer: Docs/WIP/2026-05-22_V2_HighJump_HJ21_W7B_Comparator_Alignment_Repair.md plus Captain instruction to clear roadblockers and continue HighJump without artificial stops
consumption.note: The job was submitted through the default manual web path without an explicit pipelineVariant and ran claimboundary-v2. Admin job API returned a 7605-character V2 reportMarkdown suitable for the job page V2 Report section; public/default job API returned no reportMarkdown. The primary report verdict for the hydrogen-family input was FALSE, truth 18, confidence 72, inside the expected FALSE/MOSTLY-FALSE, truth 5-25, confidence 65-85 band. Public result JSON remained 4.0.0-cb-precutover / blocked_precutover / report_damaged.

consumption.approvalPointer: Captain instruction to clear roadblockers and use HighJump without artificial stops; prompt edits/live jobs authorized in current HighJump lane
consumption.note: Default manual web path submitted without explicit pipelineVariant and stored claimboundary-v2. Admin reportMarkdown length was 8190; public/default reportMarkdown stayed null and public V2 stayed 4.0.0-cb-precutover / blocked_precutover / report_damaged. Primary hydrogen-family verdict was FALSE, truth 25, confidence 72, inside expected band. Report markdown included inline exact EvidenceItem citations and an Evidence References section.

consumption.approvalPointer: Captain request for stronger validation than single canaries under current HighJump lane
consumption.note: Default manual web path submitted without explicit pipelineVariant and stored claimboundary-v2. Hidden chain reached W5 after one OpenAlex Source Material record, but W5 returned accepted no_extractable_evidence with evidenceItemCount 0. Public V2 stayed 4.0.0-cb-precutover / blocked_precutover / report_damaged and public reportMarkdown stayed null.

consumption.approvalPointer: Captain request for stronger validation than single canaries under current HighJump lane
consumption.note: Default manual web path submitted without explicit pipelineVariant and stored claimboundary-v2. Hidden chain reached W3-B; transport succeeded but Source Material creation failed as source_material_extract_structural_rejected, so W4-G/H/W5 blocked. Follow-up local repair 70644fcb amends W3-B to continue through the bounded locator set after one invalid summary. Public V2 stayed 4.0.0-cb-precutover / blocked_precutover / report_damaged and public reportMarkdown stayed null.

consumption.note: W3-B completed with 7 Source Material records, but W4-A blocked on fetch_diagnostic_not_success. This led to ea8246ff.

consumption.approvalPointer: Captain message in current Codex thread resetting HighJump live-job budget to 18
consumption.note: German asylum input reached W5 with 1 EvidenceItem and produced a hidden internal report writer draft of 2891 bytes with Evidence References and 2 citations. Public V2 stayed blocked/precutover.

consumption.approvalPointer: Captain message in current Codex thread asking for stronger validation than single canaries
consumption.note: Hydrogen reached W5 with 4 EvidenceItems plus W8 result/draft, but internal report writer failed task-contract validation with boundary_reference_mismatch. This led to beb23bca.

consumption.approvalPointer: Captain message in current Codex thread resetting HighJump live-job budget to 18 and approving prompt edits/live jobs
consumption.note: Hydrogen rerun after aggregation_narrative ID-preservation prompt repair reached W5 with 4 EvidenceItems, W8 result/draft, and internal report writer draft 5906 bytes with Evidence References and no boundary_reference_mismatch. Public/default surfaces stayed blocked/redacted.

exceptionAccounting.reason: Two HJ11 jobs consumed budget without exercising V2 because they used the V1 claimboundary variant. Steer-Co then authorized one corrective HJ11 V2 canary, one HJ12 prompt-contract validation canary, one HJ13 OpenAlex balance canary, one HJ14 Wikimedia depth canary, one HJ15 OpenAlex fan-in canary, one HJ16 aggregate-cap recalibration canary, and one HJ17 W5 output-budget validation canary to avoid an artificial report-creation stop; all are recorded transparently.
exceptionAccounting.nextLiveJobRequirement: Any further HighJump live job requires a committed repair, runtime refresh, clean git status, route/runtime preflight, API/Web runtime commit match, and explicit Steer-Co/Captain budget reconciliation.
